news.summary: Insurity, a prominent cloud-based software provider for property and casualty insurance entities, shared that The Builders Group (TBG) has recently implemented Insurity Workers’ Comp Suite. This marks a significant achievement for TBG, as they have now fully transitioned to this platform to enhance their workers’ compensation operations. The deployment aims to empower TBG by providing contemporary tools to simplify workflows, minimize manual tasks, and offer quicker and more efficient responses. The innovative technology is set to revolutionize their processes and boost overall operational effectiveness.
news.headline: The Builders Group (TBG) has gone live on Insurity Workers’ Comp Suite for streamlined operations.

news.summary: In Minneapolis, Xcel Energy has unveiled in its 20th annual Sustainability Report its ongoing efforts to decrease carbon emissions from its operations, contributing to a cleaner environment. The company is expanding its services to support various sectors of the economy like data centers, electric vehicle charging, household heating, and natural gas production. This broadened scope aims to fuel growth and create opportunities for customers to opt for cleaner energy options. Xcel Energy's initiatives are delivering tangible benefits to customers by providing dependable electricity and promoting sustainable practices.
news.headline: Xcel Energy reduces carbon emissions, powers growth in economy with reliable electric service.

news.summary: Veolia North America, a prominent environmental services company in the US, has recently reached an agreement with the city of Sapulpa, Oklahoma, to manage and upkeep its wastewater treatment plants. The city of Sapulpa, home to approximately 23,000 residents and situated just 15 miles southwest of downtown Tulsa, approved this partnership unanimously on April 21. Veolia, leveraging its significant resources in Central Oklahoma, looks forward to collaborating with the thriving Sapulpa community in enhancing the wastewater treatment facilities.
news.headline: Veolia partners with Sapulpa for wastewater treatment, serving 23,000 residents; $X agreement approved unanimously on April 21.

news.summary: PVH Corp. and Herman Kay-Mystic LLC have revealed a fresh licensing deal for wholesale men's and women's outerwear under the Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER labels. This agreement, anticipated to commence in Spring 2026, will cover the U.S. and Canada markets. PVH, listed on NYSE as PVH, holds significant global licensing operations. The agreement involves the transfer of PVH's licensed women's wholesale business in North America over several years. PVH's diverse licensing business is recognized as a major advantage in the global market.
news.headline: PVH Corp partners with Herman Kay-Mystic LLC for Calvin Klein & TOMMY HILFIGER outerwear in US & Canada, set to debut in Spring 2026. PVH boasts a robust licensing business worldwide.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on June 5, 2025, in Buffalo, New York, New Era Cap, LLC, has signed a partnership with Major League Soccer (MLS) to become the Official On-Field Cap of all 30 MLS clubs in the U.S. and Canada. This agreement solidifies New Era's position in producing apparel and headwear for MLS with exclusive rights. This deal marks a significant milestone for both parties and signifies a lucrative venture with high market potential.
news.headline: New Era Cap partners with MLS to provide apparel for 30 teams, becoming the Official On-Field Cap of the league.

news.summary: Travelers from Columbia will now have convenient access to nonstop flights to Newark (EWR) and Orlando (MCO), as well as new service to Fort Lauderdale (FLL). Spirit Airlines (NYSE American: FLYY) has announced the expansion to its third destination in South Carolina. The flights began on June 5, 2025.
news.headline: Spirit Airlines launches service at Columbia Metropolitan Airport in South Carolina, offering nonstop flights to Newark, Orlando, and Fort Lauderdale.

news.summary: NOLA AI introduced Atomic Speed, an innovative optimization technology on June 5, 2025. The new technology is designed to significantly reduce training time and computational expenses for various AI models. This groundbreaking solution promises to be the fastest and most cost-efficient method to train any AI model, offering benefits across all major AI model structures.
news.headline: NOLA AI announces Atomic Speed technology cutting AI training time and costs; opens private beta.

news.summary: In June 2025, Delray Beach, Florida reported a significant rise in the global Oligonucleotide Synthesis Market, which reached a value of US$10.5 billion in 2025 from US$8.9 billion in 2024. Forecasts indicate a robust compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 18.6% from 2025 to 2030, leading to an estimated market valuation of US$24.7 billion by 2030.
news.headline: Global Oligonucleotide Synthesis Market to reach US$24.7 billion by 2030 with 18.6% CAGR growth from 2025, valued at US$10.5 billion in 2025.

news.summary: In Norfolk, VA, on June 5, 2025, Drucker + Falk showcased their expertise in managing multifamily properties with a strategic approach that led to the rapid success of The Port at East Beach. This premier waterfront community in Norfolk has recently finished its development and has seen significant achievements in a short period of time.
news.headline: The Port at East Beach exceeds lease-up expectations in Norfolk, VA with Drucker + Falk's expertise.

news.summary: In Burlington, ON on June 5, 2025, Brigade is set to participate in the Canadian Council of Motor Transport Administrators Annual Meeting 2025 from June 9th onward. The company will address inquiries regarding Vision Zero and present its top-tier commercial vehicle safety products. Attendees can learn more about Brigade's solutions throughout the event.
news.headline: Brigade to present Vision Zero solutions at Canadian Council of Motor Transport Administrators Annual Meeting 2025 in Burlington on June 9th.

The company plans to hold an investor webcast on June 18, 2025, to discuss these results.
news.headline: LiveOne (LVO) to reveal fiscal year 2025 financial results on June 18, 2025, after FY ending on March 31, 2025.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Ridgeway Partners, a member of RS Global Partners, announced the appointment of Alex Howard-Keyes as a Partner at their London office. Mr. Howard-Keyes will concentrate on executive searches within the Banking and Private sectors.
news.headline: Alex Howard-Keyes joins Ridgeway Partners in London as Partner on June 5, 2025, specializing in Banking and Private sectors.

news.summary: Utilizing stop-loss and take-profit orders is crucial for Bitcoin traders to automatically secure gains and limit losses in the rapidly changing 24/7 market environment. These tools are vital in effectively managing risk while trading the cryptocurrency.
news.headline: Bitcoin traders can use stop-loss and take-profit orders to automatically lock in gains and cut losses in the fast-paced 24/7 market.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 5.2%, marking an increase of 0.3% from the previous month. This brings the total number of unemployed individuals to 1.3 million. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 2.7%, with a total of 600,000 vacancies currently available in the market. Experts suggest that the current economic conditions may have contributed to these figures, signaling a potential slowdown in the job market.
news.headline: Elon Musk vows to overturn Trump tax bill, unable to protect EV credits.

news.summary: According to a recent survey by the American Staffing Association, a higher proportion of American adults are in favor of high school graduates pursuing trade schools as opposed to college. The survey, part of the Workforce Monitor® series, indicates that a significant number of respondents believe in the value of trade schools over traditional colleges for graduating seniors. The data from this survey reflects a shifting perspective among adults in the U.S. regarding post-high school education choices.
news.headline: 1/3 Americans recommend trade school over college for high school grads - survey by American Staffing Association.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts significant growth in the global security screening market. The market is projected to increase from USD 9.92 billion in 2025 to USD 13.80 billion by 2030, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.8%. This anticipated growth signifies a substantial rise in demand for security screening technologies and services worldwide.
news.headline: Global security screening market to reach $13.80 billion by 2030, growing at 6.8% CAGR from $9.92 billion in 2025.

news.summary: In New York City on June 5, 2025, Columbus Circle Capital Corp I declared that starting from June 9, 2025, investors who bought units in the Company's initial public offering will have the option to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares and warrants that came with the units. It is important to note that only whole warrants will be available for trading as no fractional warrants will be distributed upon unit separation. The separated Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market using the symbols “CCCM” and “CCCMW” respectively. On the other hand, the units that remain combined will still be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “CCCMU.”
news.headline: Columbus Circle Capital Corp I allows separate trading of Class A Shares & Warrants from June 9, 2025 on Nasdaq, symbols CCCM & CCCMW.

news.summary: A recent study found that approximately 25% of adults ages 18-65 have experienced mental health issues in the past year. The study surveyed 2000 individuals and revealed that 30% of those with mental health issues did not seek any form of treatment. Additionally, it was discovered that 40% of respondents reported feeling stressed on a daily basis, with work being the primary source of stress for 60% of those individuals. The study also highlighted a concerning trend of increasing mental health issues among young adults, with 1 in 5 individuals ages 18-25 experiencing symptoms of anxiety or depression. These findings underscore the importance of addressing mental health issues and promoting well-being across all age groups.
news.headline: Stocks stop rising as US jobs report nears: Markets Wrap.

news.summary: Today in New York, Mindbeam AI revealed their new cutting-edge framework, Litespark, on June 5, 2025. By harnessing NVIDIA accelerated computing, this innovative solution drastically enhances AI training efficiency. This advancement enables enterprise customers to minimize costs and optimize resources. Litespark promises a significant reduction in training time and an improvement in resource utilization, ultimately revolutionizing AI operations for businesses.
news.headline: Mindbeam AI's Litespark Framework speeds up language model training from months to days using NVIDIA computing, cutting costs.

news.summary: The global pediatric glioma drugs market is expected to see substantial growth, reaching an estimated value of USD 5 billion in 2024 and projected to surpass USD 11 billion by 2034. This growth is driven by increased awareness of childhood cancers, advancements in therapeutic strategies, and growing research into rare pediatric conditions. The market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate of around 8% from 2025 to 2034, with a significant shift towards targeted and immunotherapeutic treatments, alongside traditional chemotherapy approaches. Chemotherapy agents currently hold a significant market share, with targeted therapies and immunotherapy projected to witness significant annual growth rates, signifying a shift in pediatric oncology treatment paradigms. Oral drug administration is preferred due to convenience and patient compliance, with teenagers aged 13-18 being the fastest-growing demographic. North America leads the market with 42% global share, followed by Europe with 30% and the Asia-Pacific region with 20% market share. The article further details various drug types, treatments, patient demographics, regional insights, and market trends.
news.headline: Global pediatric glioma drugs market to reach over USD 11 billion by 2034, with an 8% CAGR. North America leading with 42% market share.

news.summary: The global Distributed Generation (DG) market was valued at around USD 85 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 155 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 6.5%. The market is primarily driven by the adoption of renewable energy technologies and innovations in energy storage. Renewable sources, especially solar photovoltaics, dominate the market, with residential applications accounting for about 40% of global demand. North America leads the market, contributing nearly 40% of revenue, followed by Europe at 30% and Asia-Pacific at 25%. The Asia-Pacific region is witnessing the fastest growth at a 10% CAGR, driven by factors like rapid urbanization and government subsidies. Key challenges faced by the industry include regulatory issues, supply chain volatility, and integration complexities. The market sees significant technological advancements in solar PVs, wind turbines, battery energy storage, and ownership models shifting towards customer-owned systems and third-party ownership. Despite challenges, factors like climate change concerns, falling technology costs, and government incentives are propelling the market forward.
news.headline: Global Distributed Generation (DG) market to hit USD 155 billion by 2034 fueled by renewables and storage innovations.

news.summary: The global residential energy storage market is predicted to grow significantly, from USD 10 billion in 2024 to an estimated USD 35 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 13.2%. Factors like increasing renewable energy adoption, technological advancements, supportive government policies, and rising energy prices are driving this growth. Lithium-Ion Batteries dominate the market, accounting for 60% share, followed by Lead-Acid and Flow Batteries. Systems with 5-10 kWh capacity are popular, with single-family homes being the main consumers. AC Coupled Systems and Grid-Tied connections are prevalent. Asia-Pacific leads with a 45% share. The market is segmented based on Product Type, Battery Capacity, End User, System Configuration, Grid Connection, Sales Channel, and Region.ITER_SENSE_BYPOCDEV
news.headline: Global residential energy storage market is set to reach USD 35 billion by 2034 with a 13.2% CAGR. Drivers include renewable energy adoption, tech advancements, government policies, and rising energy prices. Market dominated by Lithium-Ion Batteries at 60%, systems in 5-10 kWh range most popular, and Asia-Pacific region leads with a 45% share.

news.summary: The global Energy-as-a-Cells (EaaC) market surged from USD 45 billion in 2024 to a forecasted USD 95 billion by 2034, with an impressive 8% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR). This growth is propelled by technological innovations, environmental concerns, and government policies promoting decarbonization. EaaC integrates energy storage technologies like lithium-ion cells, solid-state batteries, and flow batteries to facilitate efficient renewable energy use, demand response, and decentralized energy generation. Among service types, Renewable Energy Management leads with a 30% market share, followed by Energy Efficiency Solutions at 25%, Storage Solutions at 20%, and Demand Response Management at 15%. Commercial Buildings are the largest end-user sector at 35%, followed by the Industrial Sector at 30% and Residential users at 20%. North America leads the market with 45% global revenue in 2024, while Europe follows at 30%. Solar power accounts for 40% of the market, with wind power at 25%, and other technologies comprising 35%.
news.headline: Global Energy-as-a-Cells (EaaC) market to double by 2034, reaching USD 95 billion at 8% CAGR during clean energy transition driven by technological innovations and government policies. Renewable Energy Management dominates at 30%, Energy Efficiency Solutions at 25%, Storage Solutions at 20%, Demand Response Management at 15%, and Energy Trading and Risk Management at 10%. Commercial Buildings lead end-user industry share at 35%, followed by the Industrial Sector at 30%, Residential users at 20%, Government and Public Sector at 10%, and Utilities at 5%. North America holds 45% market share, Europe at 30%, with solar power leading tech adoption at 40%, wind power at 25%.

news.summary: A prominent event celebrating Black Girl Joy and Dream Cultivation recently took place in Atlanta, on June 5, 2025. Hosted by the Southern Black Girls and Women's Consortium, the gathering welcomed a large number of attendees, highlighting the importance of empowering the next generation. The event featured the inaugural She Got Now Awards alongside a series of transformative workshops aimed at inspiring and uplifting participants. The consortium's mission is to support the advancement and empowerment of Southern Black girls and women, and this event was a significant step towards achieving that goal.
news.headline: Black Girls Dream Conference "She Got Next" celebrates Black girl brilliance in Atlanta with transformative workshops and awards. Over 1,000 attendees in the ultimate gathering of Black Girl Joy.

news.summary: UniFirst Corporation, traded as UNF on NYSE, has announced it will release its Fiscal 2025 third quarter results on July 2, 2025. The report is set to be made public before the market opens on that day. A conference call is scheduled for July 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time, where the company will delve into its quarterly financial results, business performance, and future prospects. During the call, UniFirst Corporation may respond to queries about various business and financial developments, earnings forecasts, and other pertinent company matters. This exchange could potentially unveil undisclosed information.
news.headline: UniFirst Corporation will announce Q3 results on July 2, 2025, before market opens. Conference call at 9:00 am ET to discuss.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Mint Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) has launched an incredible offer starting today at noon PT. New customers can now enjoy unlimited premium wireless service on the nation's largest 5G network along with the Samsung Galaxy S25 featuring Galaxy AI, all for just $30 per month. This unbeatable deal is hailed as Mint's best phone offer yet and is set to revolutionize the industry where typical phone deals often entail higher costs.
news.headline: Mint Mobile offers Samsung Galaxy S25 and unlimited premium wireless for $30/month, best phone deal ever.

news.summary: Align, a leading provider of IT services, is pleased to announce the growth of its Data Center Assessment & Modernization practice.
news.headline: Align expands Data Center Assessment & Modernization practice to guide clients towards AI readiness.
